Ready to Git Down?!
From celebrations to corporate gatherings, reserve your private event space now!
Book Your Event
There is no place like this on Broadway. Yes, we are a honky tonk... But, Redneck Riviera is way more than that. Celebrate our heroes, engage with our amazing staff, see the best in Nashville live music from opening to close. You gotta come in to see what all the buzz is about!
